Components
All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Status Bar

Slim footer bar fixed at the bottom of the app shell. Shows workshop state on the left and version / metadata on the right.

Status Bar Variants

Ready state

Ready — 0 errors, 0 warnings Components 0.1.0

Building state

Compiling 3 stories… Components 0.1.0

Error state

2 errors, 1 warning Components 0.1.0

Warning state

0 errors, 3 warnings Components 0.1.0

Rich right side — with mode indicator and git branch

Ready — all stories loaded
Light main v0.1.0 
<!-- Ready -->
<footer class="cf-statusbar">
  <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-1"></i>Ready — 0 errors, 0 warnings</span>
  <span>Components 0.1.0</span>
</footer>

<!-- Building -->
<footer class="cf-statusbar">
  <span>
    <span class="spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary me-1" role="status"></span>
    Compiling 3 stories…
  </span>
  <span>Components 0.1.0</span>
</footer>

<!-- Rich right side -->
<footer class="cf-statusbar">
  <span><i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill text-success me-1"></i>Ready</span>
  <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3">
    <span><i class="bi bi-sun me-1"></i>Light</span>
    <span><i class="bi bi-git me-1"></i>main</span>
    <span>v0.1.0</span>
  </div>
</footer>

In Context

The status bar is the last row of .cf-app's grid. Its height is controlled by the --cf-status-height CSS variable (default 1.75rem).

<div class="cf-app">
  <header class="cf-header">…</header>
  <div class="cf-workbench">…</div>
  <footer class="cf-statusbar">
    <span>Ready</span>
    <span>v0.1.0</span>
  </footer>
</div>

CSS Custom Properties

VariableDefaultControls
--cf-status-height1.75remRow height in .cf-app grid.
--cf-header-height3.75remRow height for the header row.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
